articles.title: Block reaches $45M settlement with 46 states over Cash App fraud probe
articles.description: State attorneys general said they found that Block misled users by falsely advertising that Cash App provided bank-like protections, including advanced fraud detection.

articles.title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
articles.description: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

articles.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
articles.description: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000.

articles.title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
articles.description: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

articles.title: Character.AI enters the microdrama arena with its own productions, but there’s a twist
articles.description: In an interesting twist that takes advantage of the company's core product, users can chat with these shows' characters, ask them questions, and even roleplay different storylines.

articles.title: Nandan Nilekani leaves GP role at Fundamentum as it launches $200M third fund
articles.description: Nilekani remains Fundamentum's anchor investor as the firm expands its leadership team and targets AI and fintech startups in India.

articles.title: Truecaller clashes with India’s telecom regulator over anti-spam rules

articles.title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
articles.description: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

articles.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
articles.description: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

articles.title: Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders

articles.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
articles.description: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

articles.title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
articles.description: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that applies a novel approach to inspecting chips.

articles.title: Autonomous drone delivery startup Manna plots major US expansion
articles.description: Manna is launching a U.S. operations and manufacturing facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, that will eventually employ 1,000 people.

articles.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
articles.description: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

articles.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
articles.description: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

articles.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
articles.description: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

articles.title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
articles.description: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

articles.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
articles.description: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

articles.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
articles.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]

articles.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
articles.description: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **监管与法律动态**：Block公司因Cash App欺诈调查与46个州达成4500万美元和解；法官批准马斯克150万美元SEC和解协议（尽管存在异议）；美国联邦政府要求自动驾驶公司停止干扰急救人员。
2. **AI行业融资与增长**：开源AI开发工具Ollama获6500万美元融资，用户数接近900万；Character.AI进入微短剧领域并推出自制内容；AI初创公司Anthropic、OpenAI及SpaceX的估值规模已超过过去25年科技退出的总和。
3. **企业战略与产品进展**：Anthropic推出新Claude功能，悄然向用户推广AI；SpaceXAI发布Grok 4.5模型，马斯克称其为“Opus级模型”；Lovable据传正洽谈估值翻倍至132亿美元；自主无人机配送公司Manna计划大规模拓展美国市场。
4. **技术与政策冲突**：Truecaller与印度电信监管机构就反垃圾信息规则发生冲突；谷歌深度伪造检测系统被用于揭穿麦康奈尔的恶搞图片；QuantumDiamonds在欧盟支持下致力于加速芯片制造。
5. **新兴应用与趋势**：“慢社交”应用Roost强制用户以信鸽速度互动；Nandan Nilekani离开Fundamentum GP岗位，该基金同时推出2亿美元第三期基金。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI领域融资持续火热，Ollama、Character.AI等工具和平台获得大额资本注入，同时监管与法律压力同步加大，Block和自动驾驶公司均面临实质性处罚或限制，显示出AI与科技行业正进入“高速增长与强监管并行”的新阶段。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **Hugging Face多项技术更新**：推出面向智能体的数据工具（Data for Agents）、原生速度级vLLM transformers建模后端、一键部署至Amazon SageMaker Studio、与Foundry托管计算集成，以及通过SkyPilot实现零出站存储的跨云AI工作负载运行。
2. **机器人学习框架LeRobot v0.6.0发布**：新版本聚焦“想象、评估、改进”三大方向，强化机器人学习与仿真能力。
3. **Google与OpenAI产品及合作扩展**：Gemini API新增后台任务、远程MCP等智能体功能；OpenAI发布GPT-Live、更新K-12教育AI技能计划，并公布与澳大利亚支付平台（Australian Payments Plus）及三菱日联金融集团（MUFG）的企业级合作案例。
4. **OpenAI在政府与安全领域的新策略**：明确其与政府及国家安全机构合作的原则，同时强调在代码评估中“去噪”的方法论。
5. **Hugging Face数据战略与内核重大更新**：公布第四部分数据战略（PRX Part 4），并宣布🤗 Kernels迎来重大升级。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Hugging Face集中推出从智能体工具、高性能推理后端到跨云存储的全栈基础设施更新，而OpenAI则加速向教育、金融及政府安全领域渗透，AI平台正从通用能力走向行业深度整合。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中国核能建设能力突破**：中国核工业目前已具备同时建造50座核反应堆的能力，标志着核电建设规模和技术水平的显著提升。
2. **AI领域创业与教育变革**：中国AI热潮催生新型创业者；同时，全国高校裁撤1.22万个传统专业，大量新增人工智能相关学位，反映教育体系向AI转型。
3. **AI安全与监管动向**：中国就Anthropic公司的Claude Code发布“后门”安全警报，发现其存在安全漏洞，并警告AI风险；此外，中国正考虑限制美国企业青睐的AI模型。
4. **国际科技合作与竞争**：诺贝尔化学奖得主离开美国，赴中国领导AI材料实验室；中俄在“星链”领域展开“无限制”合作；非洲市场约半数手机将用户活动数据传回中国。
5. **新兴业态与文化现象**：中国首家机器人运营酒店开业；上海Comicup漫展展示“女娲”这一避开浪漫题材的亚文化类型，体现多元创作生态。

今日最值得关注的发展：中国在核能、AI教育、AI安全监管及国际科技人才流动方面均展现出强劲的战略布局与自主掌控力。
